name: architecture-diagram
description: Generate diagrams and data charts from natural language as single-file HTML, SVG, Mermaid, and exportable PNG/PDF.

interface.shortDescription: Generate polished diagrams and data charts from natural language
interface.longDescription: Use Architecture Diagram to generate architecture diagrams, flowcharts, mind maps, ER diagrams, sequence diagrams, and data charts (bar, pie, line, area, scatter, radar, funnel, bubble, table) from natural language, with HTML, SVG, Mermaid, and exportable PNG/PDF outputs.
interface.defaultPrompt: Generate a polished diagram from my natural-language description
